questions.question: Construction site par kaam karte samay sabse pehle kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.A: Apna PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) pehna hai
options.B: Lunch break ka time pata karna

questions.explanation: Construction site par safety sabse important hai, aur PPE jaise helmet, safety shoes, gloves, safety glasses pehanna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Brickwork ke liye mortar apply karne ke liye kaunsa hand tool use hota hai?

options.B: Trowel

questions.explanation: Trowel (karni) brickwork mein mortar ko uthane, spread karne aur trim karne ke liye ek essential tool hai.

questions.question: Kisi wall ki vertical straightness check karne ke liye kaunsa tool use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Measuring Tape

questions.explanation: Plumb bob (saahul) ka use vertical alignment (seedhapan) check karne ke liye hota hai, jabki spirit level horizontal (level) aur vertical dono check karta hai, par plumb bob zyada accurate verticality ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Safety shoes pehenna kyon zaroori hai construction site par?

options.B: Pairon ko girne wale objects se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Safety shoes steel toe cap ke saath aate hain jo pairon ko heavy objects ke girne se hone wale nuksaan se bachate hain.

questions.question: Electrical tools use karte samay kya precaution lena chahiye?

options.B: Damaged wires ko ignore karna
options.C: Proper earthing aur insulation check karna

questions.explanation: Electrical tools ke saath kaam karte samay, electric shock se bachne ke liye proper earthing aur undamaged insulation wale wires ka hona bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Mortar mix karne ke liye kaunsi machine use ki jaati hai large quantity mein?

options.B: Drill Machine

questions.explanation: Concrete mixer (ya mortar mixer) ka use cement, sand, aur pani ko uniformly mix karke mortar ya concrete banane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Spirit level ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Horizontal aur vertical surfaces ko level check karna

questions.explanation: Spirit level surfaces ki levelness (samantarta) aur plumbness (seedhapan) check karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Hazardous chemicals ke saath kaam karte samay kaunsa PPE zaroori hai?

options.B: Helmet aur Safety Shoes

questions.explanation: Chemicals se aankhon aur skin ko bachane ke liye safety goggles aur gloves pehenna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Measuring tape ka use kis kaam ke liye hota hai?

options.B: Measurements lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Measuring tape (maapne wala fita) lambai, chaudai aur unchai jaise dimensions ko measure karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Scaffolding par kaam karte samay kaunsi safety precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Safety harness pehenna
options.C: Tools ko scaffolding par chhod dena

questions.explanation: Height par kaam karte samay scaffolding se girne ke khatre ko kam karne ke liye safety harness pehenna aur use anchor karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Chhote areas mein mortar mix karne ke liye kaunsa tool prefer kiya jata hai?

options.B: Hand Trowel aur Hoe

questions.explanation: Chhote areas ya kam quantity ke liye, hand trowel (karni) aur hoe (kudali) ka use karke mortar ko manually mix kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Site par first aid box kyon hona chahiye?

options.B: Minor injuries ka turant ilaaj karne ke liye

questions.explanation: First aid box mein basic medical supplies hote hain jo site par hone wali chhoti-moti choton aur accidents ka turant ilaaj karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Power tools jaise angle grinder use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Safety guard ko hata dena
options.C: Safety goggles aur face shield pehenna

questions.explanation: Angle grinder se sparks aur debris nikalte hain, isliye aankhon aur chehre ko bachane ke liye safety goggles aur face shield pehenna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Line dori aur pins ka use kis liye hota hai brickwork mein?

options.A: Bricks ko cut karne ke liye
options.B: Bricks ki course ko straight aur level rakhne ke liye
options.C: Mortar ko mix karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Line dori (mason's line) aur pins (ya corner blocks) ka use bricks ki har course ko straight aur horizontally level rakhne ke liye reference line provide karte hain.

questions.question: Ek mason ke liye sabse important quality kya hai?

options.B: Accuracy aur attention to detail

questions.explanation: Ek ache mason ke liye kaam mein accuracy (sateekta) aur detail par dhyaan dena bahut zaroori hai taki strong aur aesthetic structures banaye ja sakein.

questions.question: Toolbox mein tools ko kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Clean aur organized tareeke se

questions.explanation: Tools ko clean aur organized tareeke se rakhne se unki life badhti hai aur zaroorat padne par aasani se mil jaate hain.

questions.question: Heavy materials ko manually lift karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Apni peeth (back) ko mod kar uthana
options.B: Ghutanon (knees) ko mod kar uthana
options.C: Akele uthana chahe kitna bhi heavy ho

questions.explanation: Heavy materials ko lift karte samay, apni peeth ko seedha rakhna aur ghutanon ko mod kar uthana chahiye, taaki back injury se bacha ja sake. Agar zyada heavy ho toh help leni chahiye.

questions.question: Standard brick ka approximate size kya hota hai (India mein) without mortar?

options.B: 230mm x 110mm x 70mm

questions.explanation: Indian standard (modular) brick ka nominal size 200mm x 100mm x 100mm hota hai with mortar joint, aur actual size 190mm x 90mm x 90mm hota hai.

questions.question: Cement ko store karte samay kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Moisture (nami) se bachana

questions.explanation: Cement hygroscopic hota hai, matlab yeh hawa se nami absorb kar leta hai aur apni strength kho deta hai. Isliye use moisture-free environment mein store karna chahiye.

questions.question: Mortar banane ke liye kaunse main ingredients hote hain?

options.B: Cement, Sand, Water

questions.explanation: Mortar cement, sand (fine aggregate) aur pani ka mix hota hai, jise bricks ko jodne aur plastering ke liye use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Achhe quality ki bricks ki kya pehchan hai?

options.B: Sharp edges, uniform colour aur ring sound jab do bricks ko takraya jaye

questions.explanation: Achhi quality ki bricks ki edges sharp hoti hain, uniform colour hota hai, aur jab do bricks ko takraya jaye to metallic ring sound aati hai. Unka water absorption bhi limited hota hai.

questions.question: M20 grade concrete ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: 20 MPa compressive strength 28 din baad

questions.explanation: M20 grade concrete ka matlab hai ki uski characteristic compressive strength 28 din baad 20 N/mm² (ya 20 MPa) hogi.

questions.question: Sand (ret) ka kya role hai mortar mein?

options.B: Shrinkage ko kam karna aur economical banana

questions.explanation: Sand mortar mein shrinkage ko kam karta hai, cracks ko rokta hai, aur cement ki quantity ko kam karke mix ko economical banata hai.

questions.question: Ordinary Portland Cement (OPC) kitne grades mein available hota hai India mein?

options.B: 2 grades (33, 43)

questions.explanation: Ordinary Portland Cement (OPC) India mein primarily 33, 43 aur 53 grades mein available hota hai, jo 28 din ki compressive strength ko darshate hain.

questions.question: Fly ash bricks ke kya fayde hain?

options.B: Lightweight, less water absorption aur eco-friendly

questions.explanation: Fly ash bricks lightweight hoti hain, water absorption kam hota hai, aur yeh thermal insulation provide karti hain. Yeh eco-friendly bhi hain kyunki waste material se banti hain.

questions.question: Mortar mix ratio 1:4 ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: 1 part sand, 4 parts cement

questions.explanation: Mortar mix ratio mein pehla number cement ki quantity aur dusra sand ki quantity ko volume ke hisaab se darshata hai. Jaise 1:4 ka matlab 1 hissa cement aur 4 hissa sand.

questions.question: Bricks ko pani mein soak (bhigona) kyon kiya jata hai brickwork se pehle?

options.B: Mortar se pani absorb na karein, jisse mortar ki strength bani rahe

questions.explanation: Bricks porous hoti hain aur mortar se pani absorb kar sakti hain, jisse mortar ki curing process disrupt ho sakti hai aur uski strength kam ho sakti hai. Soaking se yeh roka jaata hai.

questions.question: Cement ki shelf life (store karne ki avadhi) kitni hoti hai ek ache storage condition mein?

options.B: 3 mahine

questions.explanation: Achhe storage conditions mein, cement apni strength 3 mahine tak retain karta hai. Uske baad uski strength dheere-dheere kam hone lagti hai.

questions.question: Agar mortar bahut zyada pani se bana ho toh kya hoga?

options.B: Uski strength kam ho jayegi aur shrinkage cracks aayenge

questions.explanation: Excess water mortar ki workability badhata hai, lekin uski strength ko kam karta hai aur drying par shrinkage cracks aane ki sambhavna badhata hai.

questions.question: Lime mortar ka primary advantage kya hai over cement mortar?

options.B: Self-healing properties aur better workability

questions.explanation: Lime mortar ki strength cement mortar se kam hoti hai, lekin uski workability achhi hoti hai, breathing properties hoti hain, aur yeh self-healing properties bhi show karta hai (chhoti cracks ko repair karta hai).

questions.question: Aggregates (bajri/kankar) ka use concrete mein kyon kiya jata hai?

options.A: Concrete ko rang dene ke liye
options.B: Cost-effective banane aur volume provide karne ke liye
options.C: Concrete ko halka banane ke liye
options.D: Concrete ko transparent banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Aggregates concrete ka bulk banate hain, uski strength aur durability mein contribute karte hain, aur cement ki quantity ko kam karke concrete ko economical banate hain.

questions.question: Achhe quality ke sand mein kya impurities nahi honi chahiye?

options.B: Stone particles

questions.explanation: Silt, clay aur organic matter sand mein hone se mortar ya concrete ki strength aur durability kam ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Ready-Mix Concrete (RMC) ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Site par hi banaya ja sakta hai
options.B: Consistent quality aur time saving
options.D: Zyada water ki zaroorat hoti hai

questions.explanation: RMC plant mein controlled conditions mein banta hai, isliye uski quality consistent hoti hai. Yeh site par mix karne ka time bachata hai aur wastage kam karta hai.

questions.question: Mortar ki workability kis par depend karti hai?

options.B: Water content, sand ki grading aur mix proportion par

questions.explanation: Mortar ki workability (kitni aasani se use apply kiya ja sakta hai) water content, sand particles ki shape aur grading, aur cement-sand ratio par depend karti hai.

questions.question: Bricklaying mein 'frog' kya hota hai?

options.B: Brick ke upari surface par bana indentation

questions.explanation: Frog brick ke top surface par ek depression hota hai jismein mortar bhar jaata hai, jo brick aur mortar ke beech better bond banane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Stretcher bond mein bricks ko kaise rakha jata hai?

options.B: Unki length (lambai) ke along

questions.explanation: Stretcher bond mein bricks ko unki lambai ke along rakha jata hai, aur har course mein bricks offset hoti hain.

questions.question: Wall ki verticality (seedhapan) check karne ke liye kaunsa tool use hota hai during bricklaying?

options.B: Spirit level aur Plumb bob

questions.explanation: Spirit level horizontal aur verticality dono check karta hai, jabki plumb bob specifically verticality (plumb) check karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: English bond mein alternate courses mein kya pattern hota hai?

options.B: Sirf header courses
options.C: Ek course stretcher aur agla course header

questions.explanation: English bond sabse strong bond mana jata hai, jismein alternate courses mein stretchers aur headers hote hain, jo achha interlocking provide karte hain.

questions.question: Mortar joints ki thickness generally kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: 10 mm

questions.explanation: Standard mortar joint ki thickness 10 mm (approx 3/8 inch) hoti hai, jo strength aur aesthetics ke liye optimal hoti hai.

questions.question: Wall corners par achhi bonding ke liye kya use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Queen Closer

questions.explanation: Queen closer (brick ki length ke along aadhi kaati hui brick) ka use corners par bonding ko improve karne aur header course mein continuous vertical joint ko break karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Brickwork mein 'raking out' kya hota hai?

options.B: Purane ya fresh mortar joints se extra mortar nikalna

questions.explanation: Raking out ka matlab hai mortar joints se loose ya extra mortar ko nikalna, jisse pointing ya plastering ke liye achhi key (pakad) mil sake.

questions.question: Wall ke base par 'Damp Proof Course (DPC)' kyon provide kiya jata hai?

options.A: Wall ko sundar banane ke liye
options.B: Ground se moisture ko wall mein upar aane se rokne ke liye
options.C: Wall ko zyada strength dene ke liye
options.D: Wall ko garam rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: DPC (Damp Proof Course) ek water-resistant layer hoti hai jo ground se capillary action dwara moisture ko wall mein upar chadne se rokti hai, jisse wall dry rehti hai.

questions.question: Mason's square (guniya) ka use kis liye hota hai?

options.B: Right angles (90 degree) check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Mason's square (guniya) ka use corners aur joints ki squareness (90 degree angle) check karne ke liye hota hai, taaki wall straight bane.

questions.question: Bricklaying mein 'buttering' kya hai?

options.B: Brick ke ends aur sides par mortar lagana

questions.explanation: Buttering ka matlab hai brick ke ends aur sides par mortar lagana, jisse jab brick ko rakha jaye toh woh adjoining bricks ke saath achhe se bond ho sake.

questions.question: Cavity wall ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Thermal insulation aur dampness se protection provide karna

questions.explanation: Cavity wall mein do alag-alag walls hoti hain jinke beech mein ek air gap hota hai. Yeh air gap thermal insulation provide karta hai aur bahar se aane wali nami ko andar aane se rokta hai.

questions.question: Header bond mein bricks ko kaise rakha jata hai?

options.B: Chaudai ke along (short face exposed)

questions.explanation: Header bond mein bricks ko unki width (chhoti face) exposed rakhte hue rakha jata hai. Yeh zyada thickness wali walls ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Wall ki setting out (layout) karte samay sabse pehle kya check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Foundation ki levelness aur squareness

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi construction se pehle, foundation ki levelness aur corners ki squareness (90 degree angles) check karna bahut zaroori hai, taki structure straight aur stable bane.

questions.question: Jo bricks aadhe mein kaati jaati hain (lengthwise), unhe kya kehte hain?

options.B: Closer

questions.explanation: Bat ek brick ka piece hota hai jo uski width ke along cut kiya jata hai. Half bat, three-quarter bat, quarter bat jaise variations hote hain jo bonding mein use hote hain.

questions.question: Flemish bond ka kya fayda hai English bond ke upar?

options.B: Better aesthetic appearance

questions.explanation: Flemish bond mein har course mein alternate headers aur stretchers hote hain. Yeh English bond se thoda kam strong hota hai, lekin iski appearance (dikhavat) zyada attractive mani jaati hai.

questions.question: Wall mein 'raking bond' kyon use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Wall ko kamzor banane ke liye
options.B: Wall ki thickness kam karne ke liye
options.C: Increased stability aur load distribution ke liye thick walls mein

questions.explanation: Raking bond (jaise diagonal bond ya herring-bone bond) thick walls mein use hota hai, jismein bricks ko diagonal ya zigzag pattern mein rakha jata hai, jisse wall ki stability aur load distribution improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Brickwork mein 'toothing' kya hota hai?

options.B: Nayi wall ko existing wall se jodne ke liye steps banana

questions.explanation: Toothing ek method hai jismein existing wall ke end par alternate courses mein bricks ko aage nikala jata hai, taaki future mein ek nayi wall ko isse achhe se joda ja sake.

questions.question: Load-bearing wall ka kya function hota hai?

options.B: Structure ke upari hisse ka weight uthana

questions.explanation: Load-bearing wall (bhaar-vahak deewar) structure ke upari floors, roof aur dusre structural elements ka weight uthati hai aur use foundation tak transfer karti hai.

questions.question: Lintel ka kya kaam hai door ya window opening ke upar?

options.B: Opening ke upar ki wall ka load support karna

questions.explanation: Lintel (dalan) ek horizontal structural member hota hai jo door ya window opening ke upar ki wall ka weight uthata hai aur use sides ki walls par transfer karta hai.

questions.question: Foundation kyon banai jaati hai kisi bhi structure ke liye?

options.B: Structure ka load safely ground mein transfer karne ke liye
options.D: Bas ek extra layer dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Foundation (neev) structure ke total load ko safely aur evenly ground mein distribute karti hai, jisse settlement aur structural damage se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Partition wall ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Ek bade kamre ko chhote hisson mein divide karna

questions.explanation: Partition wall (vibhajak deewar) non-load-bearing hoti hai aur iska primary function spaces ko divide karna aur privacy provide karna hota hai.

questions.question: Sill ka kya role hai window opening mein?

options.B: Window ke neeche se pani ko andar aane se rokna

questions.explanation: Sill (dehleez) window opening ke neeche ek horizontal component hota hai jo baarish ke pani ko window ke andar aane se rokta hai aur use bahar ki taraf drain karta hai.

questions.question: Footing ka kya matlab hai foundation mein?

options.B: Foundation ka sabse neeche wala hissa jo load distribute karta hai

questions.explanation: Footing foundation ka sabse neeche wala part hota hai jo wall ya column se aane wale load ko ground par bade area mein failata hai, jisse soil par pressure kam ho.

questions.question: Arches ka use kyon kiya jata tha purane zamane mein openings ke upar?

options.B: Load ko sides ki walls par transfer karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Arches (mehraab) openings ke upar load ko compressional forces ke roop mein sides ki supports (abutments) par transfer karte hain, jisse bade openings ko support milta hai.

questions.question: Corbel kya hai aur kyon use hota hai?

options.B: Wall se bahar nikla hua projection jo load support karta hai

questions.explanation: Corbel (karni) wall se bahar nikla hua ek structural piece hota hai jo beam, slab ya dusre structural elements ko support karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Gabion wall kis liye use hoti hai?

options.A: Building ke andar partition ke liye
options.B: Retaining wall (mitti ko rokne ke liye) aur erosion control ke liye

questions.explanation: Gabion wall wire mesh cages se banti hai jismein rocks ya stones bhare hote hain. Yeh retaining walls, erosion control, aur landscape features ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Chajja (sunshade) ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Door ya window ko dhoop aur baarish se bachana

questions.explanation: Chajja (sunshade) ek horizontal projection hota hai jo doors aur windows ke upar bana hota hai, taaki unhe direct sunlight aur baarish se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Column aur pier mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Column circular hota hai aur pier square
options.C: Column vertical load uthata hai, pier wall ko support karta hai aur load bearing bhi ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Column ek freestanding vertical support hota hai jo load uthata hai. Pier ek wall ka thickening ya projection hota hai jo load utha sakta hai ya wall ko stability de sakta hai.

questions.question: Plinth beam kahan provide kiya jata hai?

options.B: Foundation aur wall ke junction par

questions.explanation: Plinth beam foundation ke upar aur ground level par provide kiya jata hai. Yeh wall ke load ko evenly distribute karta hai aur DPC ko support karta hai.

questions.question: Retaining wall ka kya function hai?

options.B: Soil ya earth ko hold karke rakhna, jisse woh slide na ho

questions.explanation: Retaining wall (dharan deewar) ek structure hota hai jo soil ya rock ko hold karke rakhta hai, jisse woh slide ya collapse na ho, khas kar slopes par.

questions.question: Ache brickwork mein vertical joints ka alignment kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Har alternate course mein offset (staggered)

questions.explanation: Vertical joints ko har alternate course mein offset (staggered) rakhna chahiye, jisse achhi bonding aur strength milti hai. Continuous vertical joint wall ko kamzor karta hai.

questions.question: Rubble masonry kahan use hoti hai?

options.B: Compound walls, retaining walls aur foundations mein

questions.explanation: Rubble masonry mein un-dressed ya roughly dressed stones ka use hota hai. Yeh mostly foundations, compound walls, aur retaining walls jaise structures mein use hoti hai jahan aesthetics se zyada strength aur cost-effectiveness dekhi jaati hai.

questions.question: Parapet wall ka kya function hai?

options.B: Roof ke edge par safety aur aesthetics provide karna

questions.explanation: Parapet wall roof ke edge par ek chhoti wall hoti hai jo safety barrier ka kaam karti hai aur building ke aesthetics ko bhi badhati hai.

questions.question: Agar foundation ki soil ki bearing capacity kam ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Foundation area ko badhana (spread footing)

questions.explanation: Agar soil ki bearing capacity kam hai, toh foundation ka area badhana chahiye (jaise spread footing ya raft foundation) taaki load zyada bade area mein distribute ho aur soil par pressure kam ho.

questions.question: Plastering ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Wall surface ko smooth, durable aur protective finish dena

questions.explanation: Plastering wall surface ko smooth, level, aur durable banata hai. Yeh wall ko weather se bachata hai aur ek achha base provide karta hai paint ya wallpaper ke liye.

questions.question: Plastering ke liye kaunse tools use hote hain?

options.B: Trowel, Floats aur Straight Edge

questions.explanation: Plastering ke liye trowel (karni) mortar ko apply karne ke liye, floats (phanti) surface ko smooth karne ke liye, aur straight edge level check karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Plastering se pehle wall surface ko kyon wet (geela) karna chahiye?

options.B: Taki wall plaster se pani na soke aur achha bond bane
options.C: Taki wall ka rang badal jaye

questions.explanation: Wall ko geela karne se woh plaster se pani nahi soke gi. Isse plaster aur wall ke beech achha bond banta hai aur plaster mein cracks aane ki sambhavna kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Pointing ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Mortar joints ko fill karna aur finish dena

questions.explanation: Pointing ek finishing process hai jismein masonry joints se purana ya loose mortar nikal kar fresh mortar se achhe se fill kiya jata hai aur ek specific finish diya jata hai, jaise flush, raked, ya V-joint.

questions.question: Curing ka kya role hai plastering ke baad?

options.B: Plaster ki strength badhana aur cracks rokna

questions.explanation: Curing (taraai) plaster ko geela rakhne ka process hai taaki hydration process poora ho sake. Isse plaster ki strength badhti hai aur shrinkage cracks nahi aate.

questions.question: Plaster ki thickness generally kitni honi chahiye single coat mein?

options.B: 12 mm se 15 mm

questions.explanation: Normal single coat plaster ki thickness 12 mm se 15 mm hoti hai. Zyada thick plaster mein cracks aane ka khatra hota hai.

questions.question: Gypsum plaster ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Bahut zyada pani absorb karta hai
options.B: Smooth finish, fast setting aur curing ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Gypsum plaster smooth finish deta hai, jaldi set hota hai, aur iske liye curing ki zaroorat nahi hoti. Lekin yeh wet areas ke liye suitable nahi hai.

questions.question: Pointing mein 'flush joint' kaisa dikhta hai?

options.A: Joint wall surface se andar hota hai
options.B: Joint wall surface ke barabar hota hai
options.C: Joint wall surface se bahar nikla hota hai

questions.explanation: Flush joint mein mortar joint wall ki surface ke barabar hota hai, jisse ek smooth aur plain finish milta hai.

questions.question: Agar plaster mein hairline cracks aa rahe hain toh uska kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Insufficient curing ya improper mix ratio

questions.explanation: Hairline cracks (shrinkage cracks) mostly insufficient curing, bahut zyada pani ka use, ya incorrect mix ratio (cement content zyada hona) ke karan hote hain.

questions.question: Roughcast plaster kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek rough texture wala plaster jo weather protection deta hai
options.C: Sirf andar ki walls ke liye

questions.explanation: Roughcast plaster ek type ka exterior plaster hai jismein coarse aggregate (bajri) ko mix mein dala jata hai aur use wall par forcefully phenka jata hai, jisse ek rough aur highly durable finish milti hai jo weather resistant hoti hai.

questions.question: Tiling karte samay tiles ko lagane se pehle kya prepare karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Surface ko clean, dry aur level karna

questions.explanation: Tiling se pehle surface ko achhe se clean, dry, aur level karna bahut zaroori hai, taaki tiles achhe se chipak sakein aur uniform dikhein.

questions.question: Tile adhesive ko kahan apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Tile ke poore back surface par aur/ya wall/floor par

questions.explanation: Tile adhesive ko tile ke poore back surface par (back buttering) aur/ya wall/floor par evenly spread karna chahiye, jisse achha coverage aur strong bond bane.

questions.question: Grouting ka kya purpose hai tiling mein?

options.B: Tiles ke beech ke gaps ko fill karna aur water seepage rokna

questions.explanation: Grouting ek process hai jismein tiles ke beech ke gaps ko grout (cementitious material) se fill kiya jata hai. Yeh water seepage ko rokta hai, tiles ko stable rakhta hai, aur aesthetics badhata hai.

questions.question: Tile spacers kyon use hote hain tiling mein?

options.A: Tiles ko fix karne ke liye
options.B: Uniform grout lines (joints) maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Tiles ko saaf karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tile spacers (tile lagane ke beech mein use hone wale plastic crosses) ka use tiles ke beech uniform gaps maintain karne ke liye hota hai, jisse grout lines evenly dikhein.

questions.question: Jab tiles lagate hain, toh sabse pehle kahan se shuru karna chahiye?

options.B: Room ke center se ya ek reference line se

questions.explanation: Tiling shuru karte samay room ke center se ya ek reference line se shuru karna chahiye. Isse cut tiles corners par aati hain aur overall layout symmetrical dikhta hai.

questions.question: Mosaic tiling kya hai?

options.B: Chhote-chhote rang-birange pieces ko jod kar design banana

questions.explanation: Mosaic tiling ek art form hai jismein chhote-chhote tukdon (jaise tile, glass, stone) ko jod kar ek bada design ya pattern banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Achhe brickwork ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Plumb, level, straight courses aur uniform joints

questions.explanation: Achhe brickwork mein walls plumb (vertical), level (horizontal), aur straight honi chahiye. Mortar joints uniform thickness ke hone chahiye aur bonding proper honi chahiye.

questions.question: Agar wall mein dampness (nami) aa rahi hai toh uska kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.A: Proper DPC nahi hai ya damaged hai
options.B: Wall bahut dry hai
options.C: Wall ko paint kiya gaya hai

questions.explanation: Rising dampness (zameen se upar aane wali nami) ka sabse common karan damaged ya missing DPC (Damp Proof Course) hota hai.

questions.question: Cracks ko repair karne ke liye kaunsa method use hota hai?

options.B: Cracks ko saaf karna, fill karna aur patch karna

questions.explanation: Cracks ko repair karne ke liye pehle unhe saaf kiya jata hai, phir suitable filler (mortar, epoxy) se fill kiya jata hai aur phir patch karke finish diya jata hai.

questions.question: Ek standard brick wall (190x90x90mm brick, 10mm mortar) ki 1 square meter area mein approximately kitni bricks lagti hain?

options.B: 50 bricks

questions.explanation: 1 square meter area mein 10 mm mortar joint ke saath approximately 50 bricks (190x90x90mm size) lagti hain.

questions.question: Repointing ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Damaged mortar joints ko remove karke fresh mortar se fill karna

questions.explanation: Repointing ek maintenance technique hai jismein purane ya damaged mortar joints ko nikal kar unki jagah naya aur fresh mortar fill kiya jata hai, jisse wall ki durability aur aesthetics badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek mason ke liye professional ethics mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Quality work, honesty aur safety norms follow karna

questions.explanation: Professional ethics mein quality work provide karna, imandari se kaam karna, aur safety regulations ko follow karna shamil hota hai.

questions.question: Agar wall mein 'efflorescence' dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Brush se saaf karna aur source of moisture check karna

questions.explanation: Efflorescence (bricks par safed namak ke daag) moisture ke karan hota hai. Ise brush se saaf karna chahiye aur moisture ke source ko identify karke theek karna chahiye.

questions.question: Wall plaster ki strength kaise check ki jaati hai?

options.B: Us par tap karke sound sunna ya scratch test karna

questions.explanation: Achhe plaster par tap karne se solid sound aati hai aur scratch karne par woh easily nahi nikalta. Visual inspection bhi important hai.

questions.question: Sustainability in construction ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Environment-friendly materials aur methods use karna

questions.explanation: Sustainable construction ka matlab hai environment par kam se kam negative impact wale materials aur methods ka use karna, energy efficiency badhana, aur waste ko kam karna.

questions.question: Estimating materials for a wall mein kya-kya calculate karna padta hai?

options.B: Bricks, cement, sand aur water ki quantity

questions.explanation: Ek wall ke liye materials estimate karte samay bricks ka number, aur unko jodne ke liye cement, sand aur pani ki quantity (mortar ke liye) calculate karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar mortar mix mein cement kam ho toh kya hoga?

options.B: Mortar ki strength kam ho jayegi aur bond weak hoga

questions.explanation: Cement binder ka kaam karta hai. Agar cement kam hoga toh mortar ki binding property aur strength kam ho jayegi, jisse bond weak banega.

questions.question: Masonry work mein 'bulging' (wall ka bahar ki taraf nikalna) ka kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Poor workmanship, overloaded wall ya foundation settlement

questions.explanation: Bulging poor workmanship (improper bonding), wall par over-loading, ya foundation ke settlement ke karan ho sakta hai, jo wall ki stability ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: Job site par effective communication kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Misunderstandings se bachne aur kaam ko smoothly chalane ke liye
options.D: Kaam ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective communication se instructions clear rehte hain, safety badhti hai, aur team work achha hota hai, jisse kaam efficiently poora hota hai.

questions.question: Agar brickwork mein 'through cracks' develop ho jayein toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Expert advice lena aur structural assessment karwana

questions.explanation: Through cracks (jo poori wall mein aar-paar ho) serious structural issues indicate karte hain. Iske liye ek structural engineer ya expert ki salah lena aur proper assessment karwana bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Masonry tools ki proper maintenance kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf tools ko naya dikhane ke liye
options.B: Tools ki life badhane, efficiency maintain karne aur safety ke liye
options.C: Tools ko kam use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tools ki proper cleaning, oiling, aur storage se unki life badhti hai, woh achhe se kaam karte hain aur safety bhi maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Ek experienced mason ko naye technician ko kya sikhana chahiye?

options.B: Basic skills, safety practices aur quality standards

questions.explanation: Ek experienced mason ko naye technician ko basic skills, proper tool usage, safety protocols, aur high quality work standards sikhane chahiye, jo uske career ke liye bahut important hain.
